svg.text: Each fan's PWM wire (pin 4) has its own 100Ω series resistor before joining the common GP17 line.
12V and GND wires joined at Wago connectors — no daisy-chain on these fans.
Pin 3 (tach) left unconnected on all three fans.
10kΩ pull-down on MOSFET gate holds fans off when GP19 is floating.
